title: bidens andicola f. tarijensis
intro: Bidens andicola f. tarijensis, a subspecies of the Bidens andicola plant, is a flowering plant native to the Andes mountain range. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Bidens andicola f. tarijensis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
